facade_axis_note: South facade: local x = world x (increasing eastward); local y = world z (up positive, ground z=0)

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner at ground (world x=0, world y=0, z=0); facade spans world x 0..10, z 0..4.5

strokes.note: F1 wall body (single floor, z 0.00-4.50); window and door openings overlay this fill
F1 window west (2500mm wide x 1800mm tall; sill z=1.00, head z=2.80; from bottom chain 540+1500=2.04, window width 2500 → x=2.04-4.54; height from left chain 1000+1800=2800)
F1 window east (2520mm wide x 1800mm tall; sill z=1.00, head z=2.80; from bottom chain: after door at 4.54-5.44, window 2520 → x=5.44-7.96)

dimensions.note: left chain: floor to window sill
left chain: window head to roof
right chain: floor to window sill
right chain: window head to roof
center chain: door threshold / sill step (200mm)
center chain: above door to roof (z=2.60-4.50)

unknowns_noted: outline not drawn as a separate stroke: it coincides with the wall_fill outer edges (flat roof, single floor) → redundant, not traced
door at center (x=4.54-5.44) not traced; transom window above door (z≈2.60-2.80?) also not traced as its z-extent is part of the door assembly and ambiguous in this view; logged in uncaptured
uncaptured_visual_elements: F1 center door (single-leaf glazed door at x=4.54-5.44, height z≈0.20-2.60 with 200mm threshold) — recognized as door, not traced (door is not an elevation pen; healed on plan side S1)

transom window above center door (approximately z=2.60-2.80, same x-span as door, 900mm wide) — part of door assembly; logged here; not traced separately since it is part of the door frame assembly at an ambiguous z-band
outline silhouette coincides with wall_fill edges (flat roof, single floor), not drawn separately
excluded green dimension chain terminator ticks and extension lines (annotation)
